mean_cn: n.安全；保护措施；安检处；有价证券
mean_en: a place at an airport where you go after your passport has been checked so that officials can find out if you are carrying illegal drugs or weapons
sentence: You must go through the security check at the airport.
sentence_trans: 在机场，你必须通过安全检查。
word_etyma: secur安全的 + ity名词后缀 → security安全；证券
